name: fullerdev
description: Opinionated OpenCode plugin for multi-agent orchestration. Specialized subagents, built-in MCPs, skills, hooks, tools — tuned for Azure DevOps workflows (Work Items, Git, Wiki, Pipelines).
author: Arthur

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external azure-devops-node-api --external zod && bun run build:declarations
scripts.dev: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external azure-devops-node-api --external zod --watch
scripts.check:ci: bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
